message:
feat(spawn): add Codex cooldown gating for rate limit awareness

Enhance spawn logic to check Codex API cooldown before launching:
- Add codexCooldownRemaining() helper to check tracker state
- Detect if spawn includes Codex agents (opts.CodCount or AgentTypeCodex)
- Initialize rate limit tracker when Codex is present (not just smart mode)
- Gate Codex spawns on cooldown remaining

Related updates to spawn_stagger_test.go, limit_detector.go, and
pane_launcher.go for consistent rate limit handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
